metadata.purpose: Permission/redaction algorithm for PCC unified lifecycle

rules.rule: If user lacks project access, return refusal: permission-restricted; render no record data.
If source-owned record is not accessible through the user or approved app permission boundary, return withheld; do not summarize hidden content.
If record classification is privileged and user is not legal/admin named audience, return withheld and block HBI summarization.
If record redactionLevel is masked, render structural placeholder only and preserve audit marker.
If cross-project query is requested without future-pursuit-reference or executive/admin grant, refuse as cross-project-not-authorized.
If reuse blocker exists, return refusal or omit with blocker reason; never silently expose partial raw data.
If HBI has visible evidence but citations are all withheld, refuse as permission-restricted.
If warranty responsibility evidence threshold is not met, refuse as responsibility-conclusion-not-supported or insufficient-evidence.
